import React from 'react';

export function GripVerticalIcon(props: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<'svg'>) {
  return (
    <svg

      width="24"
      height="24"
      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
      fill="none"
      stroke="currentColor"
      strokeWidth="2"
      strokeLinecap="round"
      strokeLinejoin="round"

    >
      <path d="M8 5a1 1 0 1 0 2 0a1 1 0 1 0 -2 0" />

  );
}
